title: taraxacum lenkoranense
intro: Taraxacum lenkoranense, also known as the Lenkoran dandelion, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to the Caucasus region. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, and its health benefits include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various ailments such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and infections. Taraxacum lenkoranense is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
